---
title: "Man of Other Days. Recollections of the Marquis Henry Joseph Costa de Beauregard, A. 2 vols."
---

## Man of Other Days. Recollections of the Marquis Henry Joseph Costa de Beauregard, A. 2 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1877
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London : Hurst and Blackett.

### Notes

Probably translated by Julian Bargus Yonge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
